statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); effort=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.output_style.name // empty'); ctx_size=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size'); used_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); five_hr=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty'); out="[$model]"; [ -n "$effort" ] && out="$out effort:$effort"; ctx_k=$(( ctx_size / 1000 ))k; out="$out ctx:${ctx_k}"; [ -n "$used_pct" ] && out="$out ($(printf '%.0f' "$used_pct")% used)"; [ -n "$five_hr" ] && out="$out session:$(printf '%.0f' "$five_hr")%"; echo "$out"
